brief: Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death shocks Congress, while a Toronto festival shooting and a Yellowstone bison attack also make headlines. In research, new papers on AI for crime linkage and visual analytics for missing data are published.
news_summary: Senator Lindsey Graham, a key Trump ally, dies suddenly at 71, prompting mourning and discussions about succession. Other news includes a deadly shooting at a Toronto festival and a bison tossing a tourist in Yellowstone.
papers_summary: Research papers cover a range of human-computer interaction topics, including a dashboard for diagnosing missing data (ImputeViz), an industrial study of AI in crime linkage, and a visualization system for traditional Chinese paintings (CompoVista).

en.brief: Senator Lindsey Graham's sudden death shocks Congress, while a Toronto festival shooting and a Yellowstone bison attack also make headlines. In research, new papers on AI for crime linkage and visual analytics for missing data are published.
en.news_summary: Senator Lindsey Graham, a key Trump ally, dies suddenly at 71, prompting mourning and discussions about succession. Other news includes a deadly shooting at a Toronto festival and a bison tossing a tourist in Yellowstone.
en.papers_summary: Research papers cover a range of human-computer interaction topics, including a dashboard for diagnosing missing data (ImputeViz), an industrial study of AI in crime linkage, and a visualization system for traditional Chinese paintings (CompoVista).

zh.brief: 中国遭遇两场台风登陆，近200万人疏散；韩国寺庙举办静修相亲活动；新研究关注可视化与AI应用。
zh.news_summary: 台风巴威和另一台风接连登陆浙江，约200万人提前疏散。温州等地采取钉门窗、转移渔船等严密防措施。韩国僧侣组织30小时山林静修相亲，帮助单身男女寻找爱情。
zh.papers_summary: 本日无特定中文论文，英文论文涉及可视化、AI在犯罪关联分析中的应用等。

todays_image.caption: The iron lung, a relic of past respiratory crises, mirrors the sudden vacuum left by Lindsey Graham's death, as both force a struggle to breathe life into a paralyzed system.
todays_image.title: Chest Portion of an Iron Lung
